blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 153 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
